official_functions.role: Construct the official Play clientbound set_chunk_cache_radius fixture
Write, decode, and observe the official radius body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns set_chunk_cache_radius to packet id 0x5f.
The official Play clientbound protocol codec dispatches the set_chunk_cache_radius id to ClientboundSetChunkCacheRadiusPacket.
The official set_chunk_cache_radius body is one VarInt radius.
The fixture uses a primitive radius only and does not require initialized chunk, Level, or render state.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded radius, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove chunk loading, world hydration, render readiness, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer chunk loading, world hydration, render readiness, or client-load completion.
